subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Yusuf 1
subcodes.first_line: The sun hath indeed risen from the horizon of the Cause, upon which the Supreme Pen hath inscribed: "The Kingdom belongeth unto God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرقت من افق الامر شمس رقم علیها من القلم الاعلی الملک لله المقتدر العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity
